creator: tacogenius@gmail.com
text:
I know this is a day late dollar short kind of thing but I have a very 'newbie' question. I too have a Mac Pro 2008 and get to the efi loader and it gets stuck at  Start @ 0xffffffff802dfd10 like many others. I was wondering if there was a way to just copy the patched loader.efi from a flash disk to the install I already I made or whether the patched loader.efi file is now just the standard file available in FreeBSD 11- Current -

Thanks
